Cmd.Comment: LRD cmd (carried items: Slave 1 (SGDXS-xxxxA0x CoE Drive).2nd Transmit PDO mapping.Status word; Slave 1 (SGDXS-xxxxA0x CoE Drive).2nd Transmit PDO mapping.Position actual value; Slave 1 (SGDXS-xxxxA0x CoE Drive).2nd Transmit PDO mapping.Digital inputs; Read System Time from reference clock device ({0}) and write it to all slaves (register 0x0910).
